title: Module folder structure missing required files or directories
description: The module directory is missing one or more files or directories required by the CMSMS module standard.
explanation: Every CMSMS module must follow a standard folder structure. Required files include the main module class, install/uninstall methods, readme, language file, license, documentation, and an SVG icon. Missing files prevent proper installation, display, and distribution.
fix: Create the missing files/directories according to the CMSMS module structure standard.

examples.bad:
modules/MyModule/
├── MyModule.module.php
└── lang/en_US.php
(missing: method.install.php, method.uninstall.php, readme.md, doc/, assets/)
examples.good:
modules/MyModule/
├── MyModule.module.php
├── method.install.php
├── method.uninstall.php
├── readme.md
├── action.defaultadmin.php
├── assets/ (banners, icons, screenshots)
├── doc/ (LICENSE, changelog.inc, help.inc)
├── lang/en_US.php
├── lib/
└── templates/
